title: Fixture Memory 0
caption: First fixture memory — Zaventem. Destination of the opening converging arcs; sits inside the Gent ↔ Herent frame as the opening camera expects.

title: Fixture Memory 1 (Octobar)
caption: Leuven — ~17 km east of Zaventem. Tests transition continuity from hold-0 into the first travel transition.

title: Fixture Memory 2 (Picknick)
caption: Herent — ~5 km west of Leuven. Both dots visible at hold-1 ⇒ ease-in scenario. Locks the no-jump-on-first-pass behavior of EaseInCamera.

title: Fixture Milestone (Verhuis fictief)
caption: Mock milestone with a real location — uses the dim period to pre-position the camera for the next line.

title: Fixture Memory 4 (Verrassingsbord fictief)
caption: Gent — line should draw cleanly from the milestone (Herent) to here, with the camera already framing both throughout.

title: Fixture Memory 5
caption: Far from Belgium — reserved for ease-out scenario.

title: Fixture Memory 6
caption: Near Paris — reserved for zoom-in-from-wide scenario.
